summary: OAuth state generation fix verified - 13/13 tests passed. The critical bug where buildGoogleLoginUrl() was called at render time (causing state overwrites on every re-render) has been fixed. State is now generated ONLY inside the onClick handler of the Google Sign-in button, ensuring atomic state generation at click time.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthModal.jsx line 42-56: buildGoogleLoginUrl() correctly generates state, saves to both stores, and builds URL atomically
AuthModal.jsx line 166-176: onClick handler calls buildGoogleLoginUrl() at click time (NOT at render time) - THIS IS THE FIX
App.js lines 282-296: Retry button in AuthCallback also generates state at click time (already correct)
oauthState.js: Belt-and-braces storage (localStorage + cookie) working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: OAuth state generation fix verified. The fix moved state generation from render-time to click-time in AuthModal.jsx. All regression and positive tests pass. Cannot test real Google OAuth flow (requires browser consent).

test_1_no_state_on_page_load.description: Regression: State is NOT written to localStorage/cookie when landing page loads

test_2_no_state_on_modal_open.description: Regression: State is NOT written when Sign In modal opens (CRITICAL BUG FIX)

test_3_no_state_on_typing.description: Regression: State is NOT written when typing in email/password fields

test_4_no_state_on_modal_toggle.description: Regression: State is NOT written when closing and re-opening modal

test_5_state_written_on_click.description: Positive: State IS written to BOTH localStorage AND cookie when clicking Google Sign-in button
test_5_state_written_on_click.details: State written to both stores with same value

test_6_state_matches_url.description: Positive: State in storage MATCHES state in Google OAuth URL
test_6_state_matches_url.details: localStorage state = cookie state = URL state parameter

test_7_multiple_clicks_no_race.description: Positive: Multiple clicks always end with storage matching final URL (no race condition)

test_8_retry_button_works.description: Positive: Retry button on failure page generates state correctly at click time

test_9_matching_state_accepted.description: Positive: Callback with matching state attempts backend exchange (not rejected as state mismatch)
test_9_matching_state_accepted.details: Error is about invalid code, not state mismatch

test_10_wrong_state_rejected.description: Positive: Callback with wrong state correctly shows 'Security check failed (state mismatch)'

test_11_email_password_regression.description: Regression: Email/password login form still functions (no crash)

test_12_diagnostics_panel.description: Regression: Sign-in diagnostics panel renders correctly on failure page

test_13_email_diagnostics_btn.description: Regression: Email diagnostics button renders when REACT_APP_SUPPORT_EMAIL is set

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: AuthModal.jsx called buildGoogleLoginUrl() at render time, which regenerated and overwrote stored state on every re-render (modal open, form typing, focus events)
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: buildGoogleLoginUrl() is now called ONLY inside the onClick handler of the Google Sign-in button (line 171)
bug_fix_verification.verification_method: Tested that state is NOT written during page load, modal open, typing, or modal toggle - only on button click
